name: git-message-ai-codex-claude
description: Generate git commit messages from staged changes first, or fall back to working tree changes, and backfill VS Code's SCM input with local Codex or Claude CLI without auto-committing.

generateGitMessage.codexPath.description: Path to the local Codex CLI executable.

generateGitMessage.provider.description: Provider used to generate commit messages.

generateGitMessage.model.description: Codex model used to generate commit messages.

generateGitMessage.reasoningEffort.description: Reasoning effort for the Codex CLI request.

generateGitMessage.debugLogging.description: Write provider diagnostics to the 'Generate Git Message' output channel.

generateGitMessage.outputLanguage.description: Language used for the generated commit message.

generateGitMessage.claudePath.description: Path to the local Claude CLI executable.

generateGitMessage.claudeModel.description: Claude model used to generate commit messages.

generateGitMessage.promptTemplate.default:
Generate a concise git commit message from the following git diff.
Requirements:
- Return only the final commit message.
- Do not explain the result.
- Prefer Conventional Commits style when it fits the change.
- Accurately summarize the main intent of the change.
- If the change is ambiguous, choose the safest concise message.

{{diff}}
generateGitMessage.promptTemplate.description: Prompt template shared by the selected provider. Use {{diff}} as the Git diff placeholder.

generateGitMessage.timeoutMs.description: Timeout for the selected CLI command.

scripts.build: node -e "require('node:fs').rmSync('dist', { recursive: true, force: true })" && tsc -p .
